prompt_text: Hyperrealistic. Single athlete. Two arms, two legs. Natural anatomy, realistic hands. NFL quarterback stands alone beneath warm stadium lights, in full uniform and helmet, ready to throw. A smooth, controlled throw. The football rises into a perfect spiral and stays clearly in frame. The motion feels natural and powerful. Side angle. The camera gently follows the ball into flight. Warm amber stadium floodlights, powerful athletic intensity. The ball spirals cleanly against the stadium sky. Cold breath vapor visible on each exhale. Cinematic, no text overlays. Telephoto compression with shallow depth of field.

instructions.variant_text: Snap zoom locks on athlete's eyes to compress the entire world to a single point of will, dark amber stadium light swallowing every surrounding distraction — only the face and its locked resolve exist in the frame.
Aggressive handheld push-in through bright warm floodlights at full power, jersey fabric and arm loaded in foreground.
Rack focus pulls from ambient blur in cold bright clinical light — camera holds at peak action moment as the release point becomes impossible to look away from.
